title: Part 3 – Conversation : le nouveau programme bien-être
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: I heard the company is starting a new wellness program next month. Do you know what it includes? Man: Yes, I read about it on the intranet. There will be free yoga classes twice a week, and a nutritionist will be available for consultations once a month. Woman: That sounds great. Do we need to sign up in advance, or can we just show up? Man: You need to register online, because there's a limited number of spots for the yoga classes. But the nutritionist sessions are first come, first served. Woman: I'll sign up for the yoga classes today, then. Do you know where they'll be held? Man: In the conference room on the fourth floor, I believe. They're going to move some furniture around to make space.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers mainly discussing?
questions.explanation: Les deux collègues parlent du nouveau programme bien-être de l'entreprise.

questions.prompt: What does the man say about the yoga classes?
questions.explanation: Il précise qu'il faut s'inscrire en ligne car les places pour le yoga sont limitées.

questions.prompt: Where will the yoga classes take place?
choices: In the conference room on the fourth floor
questions.explanation: Il indique : "In the conference room on the fourth floor, I believe".
